title: dryas octopetala var. viscida
intro: Dryas octopetala var. viscida, commonly known as the sticky mountain avens, is a variant of the mountain avens plant that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as colds, fever, and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the sticky mountain avens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
